ab: maki qutux seto mu Pasan lalu nya, mngi maray qqaya krryax qa hiya.
ch: 我有一個同學叫Pasan，他常常忘記帶東西。
en: I have a classmate named Pasan, he often forgets to bring things.

ab: mqwas cami biru ga, musa ksiyux seto cqa enpit ccom ru brban qa hiya.
ch: 上課的時候，他跟同學借鉛筆、橡皮擦或是筆記本。
en: During class, he borrowed pencils, erasers or notebooks from his classmates.

ab: minqutux, mnxan ru mtyugan ga, ksyuxan myan qqaya hiya ha.
ch: 一次、兩次、三次，大家會借東西給他。
en: Once, twice, three times, everyone would lend him something.

ab: ana ga qutih calay kako nya la, ksiyuxan myan qqaya lga ini cami biqi loyi.
ch: 但是他有個壞習慣，經常借了東西卻不還。
en: But he has a bad habit of often borrowing things but not returning them.

ab: pucing nya lga, ini myan siyay ksiyux qqaya hiya la.
ch: 最後大家都不想借他東西了。
en: In the end, no one wanted to borrow anything from him.

ab: minqutux ryax, musa cami mcisan habax myan.
ch: 有一天，我們大家一起去郊遊。
en: One day, we all went on an outing together.

ab: cka ryaniq na ga, akya musa stanux qa Pasan qani. ana ga wal mngi maray ciligami qa Pasan la.
ch: 路途中，Pasan想上廁所，但他忘記帶衛生紙。
en: On the way, Pasan wanted to go to the bathroom, but he forgot to bring toilet paper.

ab: akya musa ksiyux ciligami seto qa hiya, kmayan qabax naha, ini cami aray uyi.
ch: 他跟同學借衛生紙，可是大家都回他說，我也沒有帶耶。
en: He borrowed toilet paper from his classmates, but everyone told him that I didn’t bring them either.

ab: mnkux ru mngilis qa Pasan qani la, myuhung kmayan maha, cwa mamu ini ksyuxi ciligami kingan!
ch: Pasan急的哭了出來，他生氣的說，為什麼大家都不借我衛生紙!
en: Pasan burst into tears. He said angrily, why don’t everyone lend me toilet paper!

ab: kyalun ni seto maha, cwa su ini aray nanaq, ana ga wal su myan ksyuxan qqaya ga, ini su calay biqi cami loyi!
ch: 同學告訴他，因為你都不自己帶，而且借給你的東西，你都不會還!
en: The classmate told him, because you didn’t bring it yourself, and you wouldn’t return the things lent to you!

ab: kncyuxan nya mwah cami mqwas biru lga, mhyuboq tehoq pqwasan biru qa Pasan ru, sbiq cami nya qabax wal myan ksyuxan hiya qa qqaya la.
ch: 隔天上學，Pasan很早就到學校了，Pasan把跟同學借的東西都還給同學們。
en: The next day at school, Pasan arrived at school early and returned everything he had borrowed from his classmates.

ab: nway son nya qabax seto ru, kyalun cami nya maha p’aray cu nanaq qqaya babaw nya la, mhway cimu ru smwan cimu pksiyux qqaya kingan.
ch: Pasan向同學們道歉，並說他以後一定會自己帶東西，也謝謝同學們之前願意借他東西。
en: Pasan apologized to the students and said that he would definitely bring his own things in the future, and thanked the classmates for their willingness to lend him things before.
